original_statement: what was the last season played?
mutated_statement: what was the last period played, both finished and still ongoing?
mutation_analysis: Term substitution + Scope extension: "season" → "period" (lexical generalization) | Added qualifier "both finished and still ongoing" expanding scope to include ongoing periods (what was the last season played? → what was the last period played, both finished and still ongoing?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据iteration 0中的judge_thought（“the most recent season shown as 2012–13...”，并标注[Correct]），agent仅返回单一答案2012–13，未提及变异问题中新增的“both finished and still ongoing”范围。具体表现为直接执行simple_query并给出原始问题的最近赛季结果，既没有识别到范围扩展的语义矛盾，也未询问或拆分已结束与仍在进行的period进行分别回答。因而该行为属于忽略矛盾/扩展指令的情况：代理没有尝试修正或合理化新增要求，而是基于可行的子集（原始“last season”）继续完成任务，符合“无视所有矛盾指令”分类。
